package.name: FrameForge_Mod
package.description: Create aluminum profile (extrusion) frames for industrial machines, conveyor systems, and structural frameworks. Supports parametric profiles (20–50 series), corner modes (miter/overlap/gap), end trimming, whistle connectors (M6–M14), hole features, gussets, end caps, extruded cutouts, BOM generation, pattern fill, and an isolate tool. Fork with performance optimizations, simplified preview, multi-selection adjust ends, and enhanced QY/T-joint connector matching.
